bio: I am a dedicated Penetration Tester and Vulnerability Assessment & Penetration Testing (VAPT) specialist with 3+ years of hands-on offensive security experience. My expertise spans the complete VAPT lifecycle — from threat modelling and reconnaissance through exploitation, post-exploitation analysis, and actionable remediation reporting aligned with OWASP Top 10 and PTES methodologies. I conduct in-depth assessments of web applications, REST APIs, internal/external network infrastructure, and cloud-exposed attack surfaces, identifying critical vulnerabilities such as SQL Injection, XSS, IDOR, SSRF, Broken Authentication, and Business Logic flaws before adversaries can exploit them.

Recognised by 20+ global organisations — including NASA, WHO, UNESCO, BBC, Singapore CSA, USDA, U.S. Department of Energy, CERT-EU, and India's NCIIPC (ranked Top 15 Contributor) — for responsible disclosure of high-impact vulnerabilities through structured Bug Bounty and CVD programmes. I actively hunt on YesWeHack, focusing on web application and API attack vectors, and hold industry certifications in WiFi Pentesting and API Pentesting & Bug Bounty.

On the defensive side, I architect and operate SIEM-based monitoring solutions using Wazuh, correlating security events across endpoints and network devices to detect anomalies, lateral movement, and intrusion attempts in real time. I also harden email infrastructure with SPF, DKIM, and DMARC policies, and configure enterprise Identity & Access Management platforms including OKTA, Auth0, SSO, and MFA — reducing the attack surface at both the perimeter and identity layer.

My mission is to bridge the gap between offensive research and practical defence — delivering security assessments that go beyond checkbox compliance to produce real risk reduction. I am actively seeking roles in VAPT, Red Teaming, or Security Engineering where I can apply my skills to protect critical systems, mentor teams on secure-by-design principles, and contribute to a stronger security posture at scale.

services.title: Web Application VAPT
services.text: Manual and automated testing of web apps against the OWASP Top 10 — auth flaws, injection, business-logic and access-control issues.

services.title: Network & Infrastructure VAPT
services.text: Vulnerability assessments and penetration testing across internal and external network infrastructure, with remediation guidance.

services.title: Bug Bounty & Vulnerability Research
services.text: 19+ Hall of Fame / acknowledgement recognitions from NASA, WHO, UNESCO, BBC, USDA, U.S. DoE, CERT-EU and others for responsible disclosure.

services.title: Security Operations & Hardening
services.text: SIEM monitoring (Wazuh), email security hardening (SPF/DKIM/DMARC), and IAM configuration (OKTA, Auth0, SSO, MFA).
